rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EFIM RYTIKOW
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Continued to may 8, 2018. notice of an amendment must be given on the mandatory judicial council Notice of Hearing form. New notice is required for the amendment. in addition, the amount that would be paid under the agreement between the heir and Ms. Rabinoff would exceed $46,000. a declaration from Ms. Rabinoff must be filed showing the services provided to the heir (see Probate Code section 11604). deadline for filing additional documents and providing a hard, file stamped copy to Room 202 is Wednesday, May 2, 2018.
